title: rubus eurythyrsos
intro: Rubus eurythyrsos, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or wild raspberry, is a species of bramble in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus eurythyrsos include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Rubus eurythyrsos include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be made by steeping the leaves and roots of the plant in hot water or a solvent.
